module.name: steps
module.description: Vertical numbered steps with a connecting line (unlike @process, which is a horizontal chevron flow). Body = one section per step.
module.aiSpec:
A VERTICAL numbered step list — for procedures, how-tos, sequential instructions (use @process instead for a compact horizontal pipeline). Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one section per step, top to bottom. Each step is Markdown (a bold title on the first line then detail reads well).
Parameters: `active` — 1-based numbers of the step(s) to highlight, as a list e.g. [2] (default [] = all shown normally). `start` — the number the first step counts from (default 1). `color` — accent colour for numbers, line and highlight (default theme accent). `numsize` — diameter of the number circles in px, 20–60 (default 34). `compact` — true | false (default false): tighter vertical spacing. `line` — true | false (default true): show the connecting line between steps. `align` — left | center | right (default left): text alignment of each step's body.
Example: <!-- @steps active: [2], numsize: 40, compact: true --> **Install** the dependencies with `npm install`. <!-- @ --> **Configure** your workspace `.mdp`. <!-- @ --> **Run** the dev server. <!-- @end -->

param.name: start
param.label: Start number
param.desc: The number the first step counts from.

param.name: line
param.label: Connecting line
param.desc: Show the line between step numbers.

param.name: align
param.label: Body align
param.desc: Text alignment of each step's body.

snippet.label: Numbered steps
snippet.text: <!-- @steps active: [1] --> **Collect** the data <!-- @ --> **Clean** and label it <!-- @ --> **Train** the model <!-- @ --> **Evaluate** on the test set <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Vertical numbered steps; `active: [n]` highlights the current step.
